title: region — trait composition
description: One owned trait — `BelongsToRegion` — for domain models that carry a `region_id` FK (Branch, Finance::Membership, Finance::Transaction, Finance::Invoice). Order matters when composed with `BelongsToTenant`: tenant MUST come first so the scope chain observes the tenant context in this trait's `booted()` hook.

owned.description: Mixed into any domain model that carries a Region FK. Adds the `region()` belongsTo relation, a `resolveInRegion(?Region $region = null)` query scope that filters `WHERE region_id = ?` (falling back to the caller's `Request::activeRegion()` when the arg is omitted), and a `booted()` hook that fills `region_id = active_region_id()` on `creating` when the field is null AND the current request carries a resolved active region. Refuses to save a row whose `region_id` points at a Region in a different tenant than the row itself (defense-in-depth against cross-tenant FK smuggling — the compliance-auditor would catch a bad schema, this catches a bad write).
usedBy: branch::Branch (required region_id — every venue anchored to a Region)
finance::Membership (required region_id — priced + taxed per Region)
finance::Transaction (required region_id — the Region that governed the sale)
subscription::TenantSubscription (optional — reserved-instance pricing may override per Region)
composition_notes: Order: `BelongsToTenant` must appear BEFORE `BelongsToRegion` in the trait list so the tenant scope resolves first and the region scope observes it.
The `booted()` fill hook is off by default for models that already default their region via a factory / observer chain (Branch). Turn on per-model via a `bool $fillRegionOnCreating = true` property.
Query scope naming: `resolveInRegion(?Region)` mirrors tenancy's `resolveInTenant(?Tenant)` — same shape, same nullable-arg-defaults-to-active behaviour.

audit.reason: Region mutations (rename, tax_config changes, status transitions, is_default flip) write to the `audits` table — every one of them is compliance-relevant.

activity.reason: Region lifecycle events feed the tenant admin's product-facing activity feed.

region.notes: Order matters. BelongsToTenant precedes every trait that observes tenant scope. HasSlug generates the tenant-unique slug on create. NO BelongsToApplication trait — Regions do NOT carry application_id (tenancy-columns.md §2).
